portalUrl.description:
Controller base URL. For local controller-rs or light-controller development, use something like
https://localhost:8443. The registration websocket is derived as /ws/microservice and discovery as /ws/discovery.

portalToken.description:
RS256 service registration token sent in service/register params.jwt. The controller verifies it against its configured
JWKS endpoint, for example http://localhost:6881/oauth2/AZZRJE52eXu3t1hseacnGQ/keys for the light-portal dev security
provider. Today the token should identify the service with cid matching the requested serviceId. Future tokens may use sid.
This value is typically provided with the LIGHT_PORTAL_AUTHORIZATION environment variable.

controllerDiscoveryToken.description: Bearer token used on the discovery websocket Authorization header. If blank, portalToken is reused.
